frame_observations.visual: Static wide shot of a GitHub repository page. The page title is 'SentrySearch'. A demo video player is embedded, showing a dark purple terminal window with a blinking cursor. The background is a scenic view of mountains at sunset.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: README, MIT license, SentrySearch, Semantic search over video footage. Type what you're looking for, get a trimmed clip back., OpenClaw Skill, demo.mp4, How it works, SentrySearch splits your videos into overlapping chunks...
frame_observations.notable_elements: The video is a screen recording demonstrating a software tool on its GitHub page.

frame_observations.visual: The view remains static on the GitHub page. Inside the embedded video, the cursor in the terminal window continues to blink.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: README, MIT license, SentrySearch, Semantic search over video footage. Type what you're looking for, get a trimmed clip back., OpenClaw Skill, demo.mp4, How it works, SentrySearch splits your videos into overlapping chunks...

frame_observations.visual: In the terminal window, text begins to be typed. The command 'sentrysearch' appears after the prompt.
frame_observations.notable_elements: The demonstration of the tool's functionality begins.

frame_observations.visual: More text is typed into the terminal, forming a natural language query: 'sentrysearch search "car with bike ra'.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: SentrySearch, (base) soham@SSR-IP:~$ sentrysearch search "car with bike ra
frame_observations.notable_elements: The user is inputting a specific, descriptive search query.

frame_observations.visual: The user finishes typing the full search query in the terminal: 'sentrysearch search "car with bike rack on back cuts me off at night"'.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: SentrySearch, (base) soham@SSR-IP:~$ sentrysearch search "car with bike rack on back cuts me off at night"
frame_observations.notable_elements: The query is specific and describes a complex event, setting up the tool's test.

frame_observations.visual: The command is entered. The terminal window is now static with the full command visible, and the cursor blinks on the next line, indicating the program is running.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: SentrySearch, (base) soham@SSR-IP:~$ sentrysearch search "car with bike rack on back cuts me off at night"
frame_observations.notable_elements: A moment of processing before the result is shown.

frame_observations.visual: The terminal window shows processing output, with lines of text appearing rapidly. A new window for a video player begins to open over the terminal.
frame_observations.notable_elements: The system has found a match and is opening the result.

frame_observations.visual: A video player window is now open, displaying dashcam footage at night. The view is from a car driving on a multi-lane highway. Other cars are visible.
frame_observations.notable_elements: The result of the search query is being played.

frame_observations.visual: The dashcam footage continues. The car is driving straight on the highway at night. Headlights and taillights of other vehicles are visible.
In the dashcam footage, a car from the left lane begins to merge into the camera car's lane, getting closer.
frame_observations.notable_elements: The key event described in the search query is about to happen.

frame_observations.visual: The car from the left, which has a bike rack on the back, cuts sharply in front of the camera car.
frame_observations.notable_elements: This is the exact moment the search query described, proving the tool's accuracy.

frame_observations.visual: The car with the bike rack is now directly in front of the camera car, its taillights bright.
The car with the bike rack continues driving ahead in the same lane.
The dashcam footage continues to show the car with the bike rack driving ahead.
The video clip continues playing, showing the car driving on the highway.
The video player window goes black, showing a VLC media player cone icon, indicating the clip has finished playing.
frame_observations.notable_elements: The first demonstration cycle is complete.

frame_observations.visual: The video player window closes, revealing the terminal window again. The terminal shows the list of top matches and a 'Saved clip' message with the file path.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: SentrySearch, [partially visible terminal output], Saved clip: /home/soham/sentrysearch_clips/match_2026-02-12_20-02-15-front_00m00s-00m18s.mp4, (base) soham@SSR-IP:~$
frame_observations.notable_elements: The tool provides feedback that the clip has been saved locally.

frame_observations.visual: The terminal is static, waiting for the next command. The cursor blinks at the prompt.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: SentrySearch, [partially visible terminal output], Saved clip: /home/soham/sentrysearch_clips/match_2026-02-12_20-02-15-front_00m00s-00m18s.mp4, (base) soham@SSR-IP:~$
frame_observations.notable_elements: The start of the second demonstration cycle.

frame_observations.visual: A new command begins to be typed into the terminal: 'sentrysearch search'.
The user continues typing the second query: 'sentrysearch search "white lifted truck gets cl'.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: SentrySearch, (base) soham@SSR-IP:~$ sentrysearch search "white lifted truck gets cl

frame_observations.visual: The user finishes typing the second query: 'sentrysearch search "white lifted truck gets close on the left at night"'.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: SentrySearch, (base) soham@SSR-IP:~$ sentrysearch search "white lifted truck gets close on the left at night"
frame_observations.notable_elements: Another specific, descriptive query is used to test the tool.

frame_observations.visual: The command is entered, and the terminal is static with the full command visible. The cursor blinks on the next line as the program processes the request.
frame_observations.on_screen_text: SentrySearch, (base) soham@SSR-IP:~$ sentrysearch search "white lifted truck gets close on the left at night"

frame_observations.visual: The terminal window shows processing output (lines of text appearing rapidly) as a new video player window begins to open.
frame_observations.notable_elements: The system has found a match for the second query.

frame_observations.visual: The video player window is opening, showing a black screen with the VLC media player cone icon in the center.
frame_observations.notable_elements: Loading state before the video clip plays.

frame_observations.visual: The VLC cone icon remains on the black screen of the video player.
The video player window is now completely black as the video clip loads.
The video clip begins. It's side-camera footage from a car at night. A large, white, lifted pickup truck is visible driving very close in the adjacent lane.
frame_observations.notable_elements: The result of the second search query is being played, and it matches the description.

frame_observations.visual: The white truck remains close alongside the camera car. The view is slightly shaky.
The white truck continues to drive alongside, its large tire filling a significant portion of the frame.
The perspective shifts slightly, showing more of the side of the white truck.
The white truck begins to pull slightly ahead of the camera car.
The truck is now further ahead, and the camera pans slightly to follow it. The image becomes more distorted and dark.
The truck is mostly out of frame, with only its rear section and tire visible as it moves away. The scene is very dark.
The truck is almost entirely out of frame, with just a sliver of its side visible against the dark road.
The view is now mostly of the dark road at night, with the truck having moved past the camera's view.

music_analysis.recommendation: The video is completely silent. Any use of this content will require a full audio treatment, including sound design or a music track, to be engaging.

overall_summary.primary_subject: A demonstration of a command-line tool called SentrySearch, which uses natural language queries to find and clip specific events from video footage.
overall_summary.pacing_profile: The pacing is moderate and procedural, following the rhythm of typing a command, waiting for processing, and watching the resulting video clip.
overall_summary.narrative_arc: The video presents a two-part demonstration. In each part, the user types a specific, descriptive query for an event in dashcam footage into a terminal. The tool then successfully finds and plays the correct video clip, validating its effectiveness. The energy peaks when the retrieved video perfectly matches the user's query.

key_moments.significance: The user inputs the first complex, natural language query, setting the stage to test the software's capability.
The retrieved video clip shows the exact moment described in the query (a car with a bike rack cutting in), proving the tool's success.
The user inputs a second, different query, demonstrating the tool's versatility.
The second retrieved clip correctly shows a white lifted truck driving close, confirming the tool's accuracy on a different type of event.

on_screen_text_summary: Semantic search over video footage. Type what you're looking for, get a trimmed clip back.
sentrysearch search "car with bike rack on back cuts me off at night"
sentrysearch search "white lifted truck gets close on the left at night"
overall_summary.analyst_notes: The video is a highly effective and concise software demonstration. It clearly shows the problem (finding a specific moment in a long video) and the solution (using the SentrySearch tool with a simple command). The choice of dashcam footage provides compelling and easily understandable examples.
